data.content: Taxonomy planning complete. The agreed repair direction is: beats are knots; steps and waves are structural plan elements, not knots; one `execution_plan` knot is the persisted plan artifact; artifact lifecycle must be separated from any execution-progress fields; and the old Scene intake path plus compat-status vocabulary must be removed from the plan path. Child knots `97b8`, `48c1`, `dd18`, and `54e9` capture the repair sequence.
